home.title: Advanced Universal Ventures
home.subtitle: A Maryland-based LLC offering professional tennis coaching, NCAA recruitment consulting, and performance-focused content creation.
home.subtitleCta: Book private tennis lessons, get NCAA guidance for student-athletes, or follow Mason's content on human performance and sports technology.
home.whatWeDoDesc: Three focused services built on real expertise
home.tennisDesc: Private lessons, group sessions, and expert guidance for student-athletes navigating the NCAA recruitment process.
home.contentDesc: Multi-platform content on human performance, sports technology, and personal growth—created by an athlete, coach, and researcher.
home.softwareDesc: Mobile applications focused on health and wellness, starting with Kevobin—a simple daily companion for seniors.
home.joinDesc: Join a small team working across coaching, content, and software development.
home.aboutDesc1: Advanced Universal Ventures, LLC was founded by Hanyu (Mason) Liu in Maryland. The company operates across three areas: tennis coaching and NCAA consulting, content creation focused on performance and technology, and software development for health applications.
home.aboutDesc2: Each service is grounded in direct experience—Mason coaches tennis, creates content, and builds products. This isn't a startup pitch; it's an operating business.

footer.description: Tennis coaching, NCAA consulting, content creation, and software development.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Advanced Universal Ventures, LLC. All rights reserved.

saas.subtitle: Mobile applications focused on health and wellness
saas.productsDesc: We build software that solves real problems. Kevobin is currently in development.

kevobin.title: Kevobin
kevobin.description: A simple daily companion designed for seniors. Large, easy-to-read interface with daily check-ins, medication reminders, hydration tracking, and safety features. Completely private—all data stays on device.
features: Daily check-in with one-tap "I'm OK" button

tennis.title: Tennis Coaching & NCAA Consulting
tennis.subtitle: Private lessons, group training, and expert guidance for student-athletes pursuing collegiate tennis
tennis.pathDesc1: Whether you're looking to improve your game or navigate the complex NCAA recruitment process, we provide hands-on coaching and consulting built on real experience.
tennis.pathDesc2: Our services range from private and group tennis lessons to comprehensive NCAA eligibility assessment and recruitment strategy for student-athletes and their families.
tennis.ncaaExpertiseDesc: Understanding of eligibility rules and recruitment timelines
tennis.personalizedApproachDesc: Tailored coaching and consulting for each athlete
tennis.provenResultsDesc: Guidance based on real coaching and recruitment work
tennis.servicesDesc: Coaching and consulting services for players at all levels
tennis.whyChooseUsDesc: What you can expect when working with us
tennis.processDesc: A straightforward path from first contact to results
tennis.readyDesc: Book a lesson or reach out to discuss NCAA consulting
tennis.bookLessonDesc: View available time slots and book your lesson. Private, duo, and group options available.
tennis.coachBio: Tennis coach and founder of Advanced Universal Ventures. Experience coaching players from beginners to competitive juniors, with knowledge of NCAA recruitment processes for student-athletes.
tennis.privateDesc: One-on-one coaching focused on your specific goals and technique
tennis.duoDesc: Train with a partner—ideal for friends or family members
tennis.groupDesc: Small group sessions for skill development and match play
tennis.ncaaDesc: Eligibility assessment, recruitment strategy, and application support for student-athletes

eligibility.title: NCAA Eligibility Assessment
eligibility.description: Review of your academic and athletic profile to determine NCAA eligibility status and identify any gaps to address.

recruitment.description: Personalized recruitment plan based on your skill level, academics, and college preferences.

academic.title: Academic Planning
academic.description: Course selection and academic planning to meet NCAA requirements while maintaining strong grades.

application.title: Application Support
application.description: Support throughout the college application and recruitment process.

benefits: Direct coaching experience at multiple skill levels
Support for both athletic and academic goals

content.title: Mason Liu
content.subtitle: Athlete • Coach • Researcher • Creator
content.subtitle2: Content on human performance, sports, technology, and personal growth
content.aboutDesc1: Hanyu (Mason) Liu is the founder of Advanced Universal Ventures—a tennis coach, researcher, and content creator focused on the intersection of sports, technology, and human performance.
content.aboutDesc2: With experience coaching players across skill levels and consulting student-athletes through the NCAA recruitment process, Mason brings a practitioner's perspective to content creation. His work explores athletic training, sports science, technology tools for performance, and lessons from competitive sports that apply to personal growth.
content.aboutDesc3: Mason creates content in English and Chinese across Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Xiaohongshu, and Bilibili.
content.creator: Founder, Advanced Universal Ventures
content.platformsDesc: Content in English and Chinese across multiple platforms
content.contentFocusDesc: Three themes that connect coaching, research, and creation
content.contentImpactDesc: Follow for new content on performance, sports, and growth
content.followJourneyDesc: New content on human performance, sports technology, and personal growth

joinUs.title: Join Our Team
joinUs.subtitle: Work with us on coaching, content, and software development
joinUs.whyJoinDesc: We're a small team working across multiple areas—there's room to learn and contribute
joinUs.cultureDesc1: Advanced Universal Ventures operates across tennis coaching, content creation, and software development. We value people who can work independently and take ownership of their work.
joinUs.cultureDesc2: Whether you're interested in coaching, video production, writing, or development, we look for people who are reliable, communicative, and genuinely interested in the work.
joinUs.cultureDesc3: This is a growing operation. Roles may evolve, and we value flexibility and a willingness to learn.
joinUs.dontSeeMatchDesc: We're always open to hearing from talented people. Send us your background and what you'd like to work on.
joinUs.readyImpactDesc: Reach out to learn more about current opportunities

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: Advanced Universal Ventures, LLC ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information across our services: Tennis Coaching, Content Creation, and Software Products.

tennis.title: 2. Tennis Coaching Services
tennis.intro: When you book tennis lessons or consulting services, we collect information necessary to provide our services.
tennis.data2: Lesson booking details (dates, times, locations, participant count)

content.title: 3. Content Creation Services
content.intro: Our content creation involves social media presence across multiple platforms. When you interact with our content, we may collect certain information.

software.title: 4. Software Products
software.intro: Our software products collect data to provide their services. Note: Kevobin stores all data locally on your device and does not transmit personal information.
software.data2: Health and fitness data (in health applications)

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. This includes encryption and secure servers where applicable. No method of transmission is 100% secure.

sharing.title: 6. Data Sharing
sharing.intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information:
sharing.item4: With service providers under confidentiality agreements

contact.content: Questions about this Privacy Policy? Contact us at:

acceptance.content: By using services provided by Advanced Universal Ventures, LLC, you agree to these terms. These apply to Tennis Coaching, Content Creation, and Software Products.

services.title: 2. Our Services

booking.title: 3. Tennis Lesson Booking
booking.item1: Bookings must be made at least 48 hours in advance
booking.item2: Group and duo lessons require minimum participants
booking.item3: Lessons not meeting minimums may be cancelled 24 hours before
booking.item4: Payment is collected at the lesson unless specified otherwise

liability.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Services are provided "as is." Advanced Universal Ventures, LLC is not liable for damages arising from use or inability to use our services.

changes.title: 5. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of updated terms.
